channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: LIVE Updates: US-Iran Deal To Be Signed In Switzerland On Friday

media:content.media:description: US Iran War LIVE Updates

item.description: US-Iran War LIVE Updates: Netanyahu pledged that Iran would never be allowed to acquire nuclear weapons, regardless of the terms of any agreement.
item.content:encoded: US-Iran War LIVE Updates: Netanyahu pledged that Iran would never be allowed to acquire nuclear weapons, regardless of the terms of any agreement.

item.title: US-Iran Deal To Be Signed In Switzerland On Friday

media:content.media:description: The deal follows weeks of fraught negotiations and threats of renewed hostilities.

item.description: A US-Iran deal aimed at ending the Middle East war will be signed at Switzerland's mountainside Burgenstock resort on Friday, the Swiss foreign ministry said.
item.content:encoded: A US-Iran deal aimed at ending the Middle East war will be signed at Switzerland's mountainside Burgenstock resort on Friday, the Swiss foreign ministry said.

item.title: Iran Threatens "Harsh Response" To Israeli Attacks In Lebanon

media:content.media:description: Iran claimed that Israel had violated the ceasefire in Lebanon "84 times" since the deal was announced.

item.description: Iran's military threatened on Tuesday to respond to Israel after strikes in southern Lebanon killed four people despite a deal between Tehran and Washington ending the Middle East war, including in Lebanon.
item.content:encoded: Iran's military threatened on Tuesday to respond to Israel after strikes in southern Lebanon killed four people despite a deal between Tehran and Washington ending the Middle East war, including in Lebanon.

item.title: Protest Held In Dhaka Over Opposition To Construction Of Lord Ram Statue

media:content.media:description: Minority groups are demanding action against threats to build country's largest Lord Ram statue

item.description: Minority groups in Bangladesh are demanding action against the threats of a project to build the country's largest statue of Lord Ram in Gaibandha's Palashbari upazila.
item.content:encoded: Minority groups in Bangladesh are demanding action against the threats of a project to build the country's largest statue of Lord Ram in Gaibandha's Palashbari upazila.

item.title: "There Would Be No Israel Without Me": Trump Amid Netanyahu Rift Buzz

media:content.media:description: Trump said he has a strong relationship with Netanyahu but warned him to show restraint

item.description: Trump's comments came as he urged Netanyahu to be more cautious over Israel's strikes in Lebanon, which he said could affect efforts towards a peace deal with Iran.
item.content:encoded: Trump's comments came as he urged Netanyahu to be more cautious over Israel's strikes in Lebanon, which he said could affect efforts towards a peace deal with Iran.

item.title: G7 Leaders Agree To Push Russia To End Ukraine War

media:content.media:description: Zelensky said in a post on X after meeting G7 leaders that Ukraine's priorities were "clear".

item.description: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky joined the summit at the French resort of Evian-les-Bains, with Ukraine seen as holding up well on the battlefield but its cities still the target of deadly Russian attacks.
item.content:encoded: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky joined the summit at the French resort of Evian-les-Bains, with Ukraine seen as holding up well on the battlefield but its cities still the target of deadly Russian attacks.

item.title: SpaceX Overtakes Amazon To Become World's 5th Most Valuable Company

media:content.media:description: Shares of SpaceX have soared about 40 percent in three sessions since last week's IPO.

item.description: In a filing with the Securities and Exchange Commission, SpaceX said the all-stock deal was expected to close in the third quarter of this year and that Cursor would become a wholly owned subsidiary.
item.content:encoded: In a filing with the Securities and Exchange Commission, SpaceX said the all-stock deal was expected to close in the third quarter of this year and that Cursor would become a wholly owned subsidiary.

item.title: Russian Artist Critical Of Putin Shot Dead In Poland, 2 Belarusians Arrested

media:content.media:description: Moscow has always denied any involvement in these attacks.

item.description: According to Polish officials, Skrepetsky -- whose real name is Robert Kuzovkov -- was shot three times on Monday morning by an unidentified gunman armed with a handgun.
item.content:encoded: According to Polish officials, Skrepetsky -- whose real name is Robert Kuzovkov -- was shot three times on Monday morning by an unidentified gunman armed with a handgun.

item.title: With Trump Present, PM Modi's "Indians Also Lost Their Lives" Remark At G7 Summit

media:content.media:description: The remarks were delivered in the presence of leaders of the G7 nations.

item.description: "Indians also lost their lives": PM Modi flags sailors' safety in front of Trump at G7 Summit
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1114132/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>"Indians also lost their lives": PM Modi flags sailors' safety in front of Trump at G7 Summit

item.title: Chinese Boy, 7, Hospitalised After Drinking Iced Beverages, Suffers Severe Abdominal Pain

media:content.media:description: Representative image.

item.description: Experts suggest that children and elderly people shouldn't consume large volumes of iced water or sweetened carbonated drinks on hot days.
item.content:encoded: Experts suggest that children and elderly people shouldn't consume large volumes of iced water or sweetened carbonated drinks on hot days.

item.title: Indian H-1B Worker Sues US Employer For Demanding Rs 94 Lakh From Him

media:content.media:description: The worker alleged that he was pressured into making payments by his Indian American employer

item.description: The worker, identified as Rishikesh Raj Meesala, alleged that he was pressured into making payments by his Indian American employer Sai Jitender Kalagra.
item.content:encoded: The worker, identified as Rishikesh Raj Meesala, alleged that he was pressured into making payments by his Indian American employer Sai Jitender Kalagra.

item.title: "Donor-Recepient" Ties Must End: PM Modi Backs Trust-Driven Relations At G7

media:content.media:description: This marks Modi's latest appearance at a G7 outreach platform.

item.description: PM Modi said energy, food, health, cyber and economic security have become so interconnected that building partnerships across nations is no longer optional but a necessity for global progress and prosperity.
item.content:encoded: PM Modi said energy, food, health, cyber and economic security have become so interconnected that building partnerships across nations is no longer optional but a necessity for global progress and prosperity.

item.title: Russian Warship Fires 'Warning Shots' At British Yacht In Channel: Report

media:content.media:description: The incident apparently took place about 20 nautical miles south of the Isle of Wight.

item.description: It came days after UK commandos intercepted and boarded a suspected Russian shadow fleet vessel in the same part of the Channel, in the first such UK-led operation.
item.content:encoded: It came days after UK commandos intercepted and boarded a suspected Russian shadow fleet vessel in the same part of the Channel, in the first such UK-led operation.

item.title: Romania Honours Indian-Origin Worker For Saving 5-Year-Old From Frozen Lake

media:content.media:description: The title was formally conferred on June 4.

item.description: Both Kumar and the girl suffered severe hypothermic shock and were rushed to the hospital, where they received treatment.
item.content:encoded: Both Kumar and the girl suffered severe hypothermic shock and were rushed to the hospital, where they received treatment.

item.title: Viral 'Benadryl Challenge' Leaves US Teen Critically Ill. Here's What It Is

media:content.media:description: She was reportedly hospitalised with "zero brain activity".

item.description: Fifteen-year-old Leah Presson was hospitalised with "zero brain activity" following an attempt at this viral trend.
item.content:encoded: Fifteen-year-old Leah Presson was hospitalised with "zero brain activity" following an attempt at this viral trend.

item.title: Why This American Covid Lab Company Is Giving Millions Of Dollars In Payouts

media:content.media:description: The company has now shut down permanently.

item.description: At its peak, GS Labs handled between 20 and 30 per cent of the rapid testing market in states such as Minnesota and Washington.
item.content:encoded: At its peak, GS Labs handled between 20 and 30 per cent of the rapid testing market in states such as Minnesota and Washington.

item.title: PM Modi, Trump's G7 Handshake Ahead Of Bilateral, First Meet In 16 Months

media:content.media:description: PM Modi arrived in France to attend the G7 Summit

item.description: Prior to this interaction, the last time the two leaders met face-to-face was in February 2025 at the White House in Washington, DC, shortly after Trump's second inauguration.
item.content:encoded: Prior to this interaction, the last time the two leaders met face-to-face was in February 2025 at the White House in Washington, DC, shortly after Trump's second inauguration.

item.title: Ghost Ships Are Hiding A Bigger Risk Than Expected. They Are Floating Hazards

media:content.media:description: Cyber teams say these ship owners ignore both physical safety rules and digital security checks

item.description: The US Coast Guard's cyber teams say these ship owners often ignore both physical safety rules and digital security checks, leaving the vessels vulnerable.
item.content:encoded: The US Coast Guard's cyber teams say these ship owners often ignore both physical safety rules and digital security checks, leaving the vessels vulnerable.

item.title: Iran Deal Memo Clearly Says Tehran Will Not Have Nuclear Weapons: Trump

media:content.media:description: Trump said that he will release the text of the US-Iran memorandum in a formal setting.

item.description: Trump also said he likes the idea of sending the Iran deal to Congress for review, a request by some Republican lawmakers.
item.content:encoded: Trump also said he likes the idea of sending the Iran deal to Congress for review, a request by some Republican lawmakers.

item.title: How A Tip-Off Led FBI To Foil Attack Plot At Trump UFC Event

media:content.media:description: FBI Director Kash Patel announced the development on Tuesday in a post on X.

item.description: The White House hosted the UFC event on Sunday, which coincided with President Trump's 80th birthday and formed part of celebrations marking the nation's 250th anniversary.
item.content:encoded: The White House hosted the UFC event on Sunday, which coincided with President Trump's 80th birthday and formed part of celebrations marking the nation's 250th anniversary.
